description: Request body to generate a coverage report (POST /v1/coverage/report, coverage_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'format' selects the output rendering; 'show_missing' adds uncovered line annotations.

format.description: Report output format. 'text' returns plain-text coverage summary; 'html' returns an HTML report.

show_missing.description: When true, annotate the report with line numbers of uncovered code.
